positive: A majestic, abstract celestial nebula forming a geometric woodland animal silhouette, such as a stylized fox or owl. The scene features deep indigo blues, vibrant cosmic purples, and glowing emerald greens, set against a stark, clean cream background. The nebula should appear both ethereal and graphically structured, mimicking stained glass or mandalas, with sharp, clean edges perfect for printing. Central composition, strong contrast between the silhouette and the background, highly detailed, vector-art quality, symmetrical design, minimalist yet complex, suitable for apparel printing.
